title: I Forge Digital Future!
description:
I’m Murali Krishna, a Senior Product Designer with ~4 years of experience crafting user-centric digital products. I specialize in transforming complex problems into intuitive user experiences and clean, scalable interfaces.

My work spans diverse domains including travel, social platforms, mobility, edtech, health, e-commerce, and SaaS, where I’ve designed solutions for both web and mobile ecosystems.

Currently at MiVoyage, I lead end-to-end product design, from discovery and user research to design systems and final delivery. I collaborate closely with product managers and engineers to create impactful, user-focused experiences that align business goals with real user needs.
subtitle: MY PROFESSIONAL PROFILE
